case_title: SEARS ROEBUCK AND COMPANY A CORPORATION VS RICHARDS PATRICIA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $324.41 FILED BY SEARS ROEBUCK AND COMPANY A CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT RICHARDS PATRICIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-03-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 04
